description_long: This is an adult male figure depicted in a casual urban outfit, featuring a collared, long-sleeve shirt with the sleeves rolled up to the elbows and a pair of fitted pants. The figure stands upright with arms slightly bent and fingers relaxed, suggesting a neutral, at-ease posture. The shirt is untucked, and the pants are straight-legged, giving a modern, everyday appearance suitable for city environments. The individual is barefoot, with defined toes and naturalistic foot anatomy. The hairstyle is short and neatly styled, swept back from the forehead, and the facial features are clean-shaven and symmetrical. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and subtle anatomical details visible in the hands and face.
description: A casually dressed adult male standing upright, wearing a collared shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted pants, barefoot and with neatly styled short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared shirt, rolled sleeves, relaxed hands, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the shirt's fit, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, pants, and hairstyle, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, shirt contour, and natural stance.
attribute_clothing_type: casual collared long-sleeve shirt and fitted pants
